case_title: RAYNAUD LOZADA VS. ROSE REYES et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST T. T. OTUS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-07-2010 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-22-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE AND MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOZADA, RAYNAUD HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-07-2011 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-07-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO RELIEVED AS COUNSEL-CIVIL.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-31-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-31-2011 CONTINUED TO AUG-01-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-01-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-07-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-21-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-01-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOZADA, RAYNAUD AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, ROSE REYES, BERNARDO DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-21-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-18-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-06-2011
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

LAW AND MOTION 301, ATTY. T. TROY OTUS' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF RAYNAUD LOZADA IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST RAYNAUD LOZADA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-31-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-15-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There was no appearance nor objection filed. Therefore, the court ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)
